title: lastrea belensis
intro: Lastrea belensis, also known as the Blechnum species, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Blechnaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Lastrea belensis include reducing inflammation and promoting wound healing, as well as being used to treat various gastrointestinal issues. Herbal preparations of Lastrea belensis include infusions, tinctures, and decoctions, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
